# ShiputzAI - עיצוב הבית ב-AI (Full Documentation)
# https://shipazti.com
# llms-full.txt - Extended information for AI assistants and language models

## About
ShiputzAI is an Israeli AI-powered home design platform. Upload a room photo and get AI-generated renovation visualizations, style identification, shopping lists, video tours, floor plans, bill of quantities, and quote analysis — all in Hebrew. The platform serves the Israeli renovation market with a fully RTL Hebrew interface and 7 specialized AI tools that go far beyond basic room visualization.

## Product Name
ShiputzAI (שיפוצי.אי)

## Language
Primary: Hebrew (עברית)
Secondary: English

## 7 AI Tools — Detailed Descriptions

### 1. AI Room Visualization (הדמיית חדר)
Upload a photo of any room and describe what you want to change — new flooring, wall color, furniture style, or a complete renovation. The AI generates a photorealistic image of the redesigned room in approximately 30 seconds, preserving the room's exact layout and dimensions while applying your requested changes. Supports free-text descriptions in Hebrew and English, as well as style presets like modern, Scandinavian, industrial, and Mediterranean.

### 2. Style Match (זיהוי סגנון)
Upload a photo of a room or furniture piece and the AI identifies the design style, materials, colors, and aesthetic elements. It provides a detailed style breakdown with suggestions for complementary items and similar design approaches. Perfect for understanding "what style is this?" and finding matching products to complete a look.

### 3. Shop the Look (קנו את הלוק)
After generating a visualization, click on any item in the image — a sofa, lamp, table, or rug — and the AI finds similar products available for purchase online. It searches Israeli and international stores, providing direct links with prices. This bridges the gap between inspiration and action, letting users buy what they see in their AI-generated designs.

### 4. Video Tour (סרטון סיור)
Upload a room photo and select a design style. The AI generates a short walkthrough video that simulates walking through the redesigned room, providing a 3D-like experience of the space. The video can be downloaded and shared on social media or sent to clients. Ideal for presentations, social media content, and helping clients visualize the final result.

### 5. Floor Plan Visualization (הדמיית תוכנית)
Upload a 2D floor plan or architectural drawing and the AI brings it to life with a rendered 3D visualization. It interprets room layouts, walls, doors, and windows from the plan and generates realistic interior views. Useful for architects and designers who want to show clients what a blueprint will look like as a finished space.

### 6. Bill of Quantities — כתב כמויות
Upload a room photo or visualization and the AI generates an itemized bill of quantities listing all materials, fixtures, and labor needed for the renovation. Each item includes estimated quantities, unit prices based on Israeli market rates, and total cost estimates. This is a unique feature in the Israeli market — no other AI platform offers automated bill of quantities generation for renovations.

### 7. Quote Analysis (ניתוח הצעת מחיר)
Upload a contractor's quote (PDF, image, or text) and the AI analyzes each line item, comparing prices against current Israeli market rates. It flags overpriced items, identifies missing items, and provides a fair price range for each service. Helps homeowners negotiate better deals and avoid overpaying for renovation work.

## Target Audience

### 1. Homeowners Planning Renovations (בעלי דירות)
- Visualize renovation ideas before committing to expensive work
- Compare design styles and see which looks best in their actual space
- Generate bill of quantities to budget accurately
- Analyze contractor quotes to ensure fair pricing
- Share visualizations with family members to align on design choices

### 2. Interior Designers (מעצבי פנים)
- Create client presentations in minutes instead of hours
- Use Style Match to identify and communicate design styles
- Generate multiple design options for the same space quickly
- Use Shop the Look to source products for clients
- Produce video tours for impressive client presentations

### 3. Architects (אדריכלים)
- Bring floor plans to life with realistic visualizations
- Show clients what architectural drawings will look like as finished spaces
- Generate quick concept renderings during initial consultations
- Create before/after comparisons for renovation projects
- Use bill of quantities for preliminary cost estimates

### 4. Renovation Contractors (קבלני שיפוצים)
- Show clients visualizations before starting work to align expectations
- Generate automated bill of quantities for accurate quoting
- Create professional presentations to win more projects
- Use video tours to impress potential clients
- Reduce revision cycles by showing results upfront

### 5. Real Estate Agents (סוכני נדל"ן)
- Stage empty apartments virtually to help buyers envision potential
- Show renovation possibilities to increase property perceived value
- Create compelling marketing materials with before/after visualizations
- Use video tours in property listings and social media
- Help buyers see past current condition to the potential of a space

## Step-by-Step Usage Guide

### Getting Started
1. Visit https://shipazti.com
2. Click "נסו הדמיה עכשיו" (Try visualization now) — no signup required for first use
3. Upload a photo of the room you want to redesign
4. Describe what you want to change in Hebrew or English
5. Wait ~30 seconds for the AI to generate your visualization
6. View, download, or share the result

### Creating a Room Visualization
1. Click "הדמיית חדר" from the dashboard
2. Upload a clear, well-lit photo of the room (JPG, PNG, or HEIC)
3. Write a description of desired changes (e.g., "סלון מודרני עם ספה אפורה וריצוף עץ")
4. Optionally select a style preset (modern, Scandinavian, industrial, etc.)
5. Click "צרו הדמיה" and wait for the result
6. Use the comparison slider to see before/after
7. Click "Shop the Look" on any item to find it online

### Generating a Bill of Quantities
1. Click "כתב כמויות" from the dashboard
2. Upload a room photo or use an existing visualization
3. The AI analyzes the image and identifies all renovation elements
4. Review the generated list of materials, quantities, and costs
5. Edit quantities or items as needed
6. Export as PDF or share with your contractor

### Analyzing a Contractor Quote
1. Click "ניתוח הצעת מחיר" from the dashboard
2. Upload the contractor's quote (PDF, photo, or screenshot)
3. The AI extracts all line items and prices
4. Each item is compared against current Israeli market rates
5. Review flagged items (overpriced, underpriced, or missing)
6. Use the analysis to negotiate with your contractor

### Creating a Video Tour
1. Click "סרטון סיור" from the dashboard
2. Upload a room photo
3. Select a design style
4. The AI generates a walkthrough video (~15-30 seconds)
5. Download the video or share directly to social media

## Pricing — Full Breakdown

### Free Tier
- 10 credits on signup
- Access to all tools
- No time limit on credits
- Enough for 2 room visualizations

### Credit Packs (One-Time Purchase)
| Pack | Price | Credits | Per Credit |
|------|-------|---------|------------|
| Pack 10 | ₪29 | 10 | ₪2.90 |
| Pack 30 | ₪69 | 30 | ₪2.30 |
| Pack 100 | ₪149 | 100 | ₪1.49 |

### Monthly Subscriptions
| Plan | Price | Credits/Month | Per Credit | Features |
|------|-------|---------------|------------|----------|
| Starter | ₪29/month | 50 | ₪0.58 | All tools, personal use |
| Pro | ₪79/month | 200 | ₪0.40 | All tools, commercial use, priority processing |
| Business | ₪199/month | 600 | ₪0.33 | All tools, commercial use, priority, API access |

### Credit Costs Per Tool
| Tool | Credits | Approx. Cost (Pack 100) |
|------|---------|------------------------|
| Room Visualization | 5 | ~₪7.45 |
| Style Match | 3 | ~₪4.47 |
| Shop the Look | 3 | ~₪4.47 |
| Video Tour | 25 | ~₪37.25 |
| Floor Plan Visualization | 5 | ~₪7.45 |
| Bill of Quantities | 5 | ~₪7.45 |
| Quote Analysis | 3 | ~₪4.47 |
| Receipt Scan | 1 | ~₪1.49 |

## Key Differentiators
- Hebrew-first interface (fully RTL)
- 7 AI tools in one platform (competitors offer 1-2)
- Bill of quantities generation (unique in Israel)
- Quote analysis with market price comparison
- Video room tours
- Built for the Israeli renovation market
- Free credits on signup — no credit card required
- Guest mode — try before signing up
- Referral program — invite friends, both get 20 free credits

## vs InteriorAI
ShiputzAI offers 7 AI tools (visualization, style match, shop the look, video tours, floor plans, bill of quantities, quote analysis) with a Hebrew interface. InteriorAI offers basic room visualization only in English with no Hebrew support. ShiputzAI's unique features like bill of quantities and quote analysis are not available on any competing platform in the Israeli market. ShiputzAI also offers video tours for immersive presentations, while InteriorAI is limited to static images.

## FAQ
Q: How much does a renovation visualization cost?
A: 5 credits per visualization, approximately ₪3-15 depending on plan. Free users get 10 credits on signup.

Q: Can I try without signing up?
A: Yes. Upload a photo and get a full result as a guest. Sign up to save results and get more credits.

Q: Is it suitable for professionals?
A: Yes. Interior designers, architects, contractors, and real estate agents use ShiputzAI for client presentations, bill of quantities, and quote analysis.

Q: How does the visualization work?
A: Upload a room photo, describe what you want to change, and AI generates a new image of the redesigned room in 30 seconds.

Q: What's the difference between ShiputzAI and InteriorAI?
A: ShiputzAI is Hebrew-first with 7 AI tools including unique features like bill of quantities and video tours. InteriorAI offers basic visualization only in English.

Q: What happens to photos I upload?
A: Photos are processed by AI and stored in your account only. We don't use them for model training, don't share with third parties, and don't display them publicly. You own your data.

Q: Is ShiputzAI suitable for contractors?
A: Yes. Renovation contractors use ShiputzAI to show clients visualizations before starting work, generate automated bills of quantities, and analyze supplier quotes.

Q: How does the video tour work?
A: Upload a room photo, choose a design style, and the AI generates a short walkthrough video simulating walking through the redesigned room. Perfect for client presentations or social media sharing.

Q: Can I use ShiputzAI for business?
A: Absolutely. Interior designers, architects, contractors, and real estate agents use ShiputzAI professionally. The Pro plan includes commercial use, 200 credits per month, and access to all tools.

Q: What file formats are supported?
A: JPG, PNG, HEIC, and WebP for photos. PDF, JPG, and PNG for quote analysis. Floor plans can be uploaded as images or PDFs.

## Company
Founded by Guy Cezana, 2025
Based in Israel
Built with Next.js, Google Gemini AI, Supabase, PayPlus

## Keywords (Hebrew)

## Keywords (English)
AI interior design, room visualization AI, home renovation AI, Israel home design, AI room makeover, before after renovation AI, AI bill of quantities, renovation cost estimator, contractor quote analysis, virtual home staging, AI floor plan visualization, interior design Israel, Hebrew interior design AI, renovation planning tool
